name: VK TOKEN
description: VK Token (VK) is the native digital value unit of the VK Network built on the BNB Smart Chain (BEP-20). It functions as a utility token used for value exchange, network service fees, and participation in community governance within the VK ecosystem. VK has a permanently fixed total supply of 28,000,000,000 tokens, all minted at genesis with no inflation or additional issuance, ensuring transparent and verifiable on-chain value infrastructure.
